hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】鲍威尔认为通胀前景受到控制，无需因石油冲击而加息；【FINANCE】Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程；【FINANCE】沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场。

items.title: Powell sees inflation outlook in check, no need to hike rates because of oil shock
items.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell spoke Monday at Harvard University.
items.title_zh: 鲍威尔认为通胀前景受到控制，无需因石油冲击而加息
items.summary_zh: 美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔周一在哈佛大学发表讲话。

items.title: Visa launches new AI tools to manage the charge dispute process
items.summary: Visa's new tools are part of a larger push by major banks and financial institutions to incorporate AI into their businesses.
items.title_zh: Visa推出新的人工智能工具来管理收费争议流程
items.summary_zh: Visa 的新工具是主要银行和金融机构将人工智能融入其业务的更大努力的一部分。

items.title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
items.summary: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场
items.summary_zh: 即使伯克希尔哈撒韦公司去年底减持了其股份，苹果公司仍然是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司最大的持股公司。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Forces Search for Missing Airman After Iran Downs Jet
items.summary: The F-15E was the first U.S. warplane shot down by Iran in the war. The episode presents challenges for the United States that would grow if the missing airman is taken prisoner.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：伊朗击落喷气式飞机后，美军搜寻失踪飞行员
items.summary_zh: F-15E是战争中第一架被伊朗击落的美国战机。如果失踪的飞行员被俘，这一事件给美国带来的挑战将会更大。

items.title: Riot Platforms sells $290 million worth of bitcoin during Q1
items.summary: Other major bitcoin miners have been selling their BTC holdings amid a broader shift toward AI and HPC infrastructure.
items.title_zh: Riot Platforms 第一季度出售了价值 2.9 亿美元的比特币
items.summary_zh: 随着人工智能和高性能计算基础设施的广泛转变，其他主要比特币矿商一直在出售其持有的比特币。

items.title: MIT engineers design proteins by their motion, not just their shape
items.summary: An AI model generates novel proteins based on how they vibrate and move, opening new possibilities for dynamic biomaterials and adaptive therapeutics.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的工程师根据蛋白质的运动而不仅仅是形状来设计蛋白质
items.summary_zh: 人工智能模型根据蛋白质的振动和移动方式生成新型蛋白质，为动态生物材料和适应性治疗开辟了新的可能性。

items.title: Augmenting citizen science with computer vision for fish monitoring
items.summary: MIT Sea Grant works with the Woodwell Climate Research Center and other collaborators to demonstrate a deep learning-based system for fish monitoring.
items.title_zh: 通过鱼类监测的计算机视觉增强公民科学
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院海洋格兰特与伍德韦尔气候研究中心和其他合作者合作，展示了一种基于深度学习的鱼类监测系统。

items.title: Blue Owl caps private credit funds redemptions at 5% after steep request levels
items.summary: Blue Owl attributed the higher-than-usual requests to "heightened market concerns around AI-related disruption to software companies."
items.title_zh: 在要求水平过高后，Blue Owl 将私人信贷基金赎回上限限制在 5%
items.summary_zh: Blue Owl 将高于平常的请求归因于“市场对人工智能相关软件公司中断的担忧加剧”。

items.title: Warren Buffett says Iran bomb would make nuclear disaster harder to avoid
items.summary: The Berkshire Hathaway chairman said the growing number of nuclear-armed states has fundamentally altered the global risk landscape.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特称伊朗炸弹将使核灾难更难以避免
items.summary_zh: 这位伯克希尔哈撒韦公司董事长表示，越来越多的核武器国家从根本上改变了全球风险格局。

items.title: Warren Buffett says he's still making calls on investments at Berkshire, flags 'tiny' new buy
items.summary: The 95-year-old investor said he still comes into the office daily and stays engaged with markets.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他仍在呼吁伯克希尔的投资，并表示“小规模”新收购
items.summary_zh: 这位 95 岁的投资者表示，他仍然每天来到办公室并与市场保持联系。

items.title: Warren Buffett teams up with NBA superstar Stephen Curry for charity lunch, reviving iconic auction
items.summary: The winning bidder — along with up to seven guests — will join Buffett and the Currys for an exclusive lunch in Omaha, Nebraska.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特与 NBA 巨星斯蒂芬·库里合作举办慈善午餐，复兴标志性拍卖
items.summary_zh: 中标者以及最多七位客人将在内布拉斯加州奥马哈与巴菲特和库里家族一起享用独家午餐。

items.title: Three niche commodity prices are surging. What they show about China's grip on supply chains
items.summary: In the wake of the Iran war, prices are surging for critical elements used in defense and the semiconductors that power artificial intelligence advances.
items.title_zh: 三大利基商品价格大幅上涨。它们显示了中国对供应链的控制
items.summary_zh: 伊朗战争后，用于国防的关键元件和推动人工智能进步的半导体的价格飙升。

items.title: Bill Ackman says it’s one of the best times in a long time to buy quality stocks
items.summary: Ackman's bullish stance comes at a time when markets have been rattled by rising energy prices and sticky inflation concerns.
items.title_zh: 比尔·阿克曼表示，这是长期以来购买优质股票的最佳时机之一
items.summary_zh: 阿克曼的看涨立场是在市场因能源价格上涨和通胀担忧而感到不安之际提出的。

items.title: Artemis II crew now halfway to Moon as they take 'spectacular' image of Earth
items.summary: The snap was taken aboard the Orion capsule by its commander, Reid Wiseman, as the crew head towards the Moon.
items.title_zh: 阿耳忒弥斯二号船员现在正在前往月球的途中，他们正在拍摄地球的“壮观”图像
items.summary_zh: 这张照片是由猎户座太空舱的指挥官里德·怀斯曼在宇航员前往月球时拍摄的。

items.title: After 16 years in power, can Viktor Orban finally be unseated?
items.summary: Hungary is going to the polls in nine days - after 16 years in power, can Viktor Orban be unseated?
items.title_zh: 执政16年后，维克多·欧尔班最终能否被赶下台？
items.summary_zh: 匈牙利将于 9 天后举行大选——执政 16 年后，欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orban) 能否被赶下台？

items.title: France's Muslim gathering ban overturned by courts
items.summary: The Paris police department had argued that the four-day gathering was a security threat because it could be a target of terrorism.
items.title_zh: 法国法院推翻穆斯林集会禁令
items.summary_zh: 巴黎警察局辩称，为期四天的集会构成安全威胁，因为它可能成为恐怖主义的目标。

items.title: Epstein Presented Himself to Indian Tycoon as a Trump White House Insider
items.summary: The convicted sex offender gave Anil Ambani information on appointments and foreign policy. Some seemed prescient, though there was no evidence he was close to the administration.
items.title_zh: 爱泼斯坦以特朗普白宫内部人士的身份向印度大亨介绍自己
items.summary_zh: 被定罪的性犯罪者向阿尼尔·安巴尼提供了有关任命和外交政策的信息。有些人似乎很有先见之明，尽管没有证据表明他与政府关系密切。

items.title: At War With Iran Again, Some Israelis Fear Conflict Is Becoming Routine
items.summary: A majority of Israelis support the war with Iran, but many doubt that it will solve Israel’s long-term security problems. Some also question their prime minister’s assurances and motives.
items.title_zh: 与伊朗再次交战，一些以色列人担心冲突正在成为常态
items.summary_zh: 大多数以色列人支持与伊朗开战，但许多人怀疑这能否解决以色列的长期安全问题。一些人还质疑总理的保证和动机。

items.title: Judge continues Nevada ban on Kalshi sports markets
items.summary: A state judge ruled that Kalshi's prediction markets offering sports bets were "indistinguishable" from gambling, and extended a temporary ban in Nevada.
items.title_zh: 法官继续内华达州对卡尔希体育市场的禁令
items.summary_zh: 一名州法官裁定卡尔希提供体育投注的预测市场与赌博“没有区别”，并延长了内华达州的临时禁令。

items.title: Schwab plans spot bitcoin, ether trading launch in first half of 2026
items.summary: The financial services giant with almost $12 trillion in client assets is moving closer to direct crypto trading, offering subscription for early access to the Schwab Crypto account.
items.title_zh: 嘉信理财计划于 2026 年上半年推出比特币、以太币现货交易
items.summary_zh: 这家拥有近 12 万亿美元客户资产的金融服务巨头正在向直接加密货币交易迈进，提供早期访问 Schwab Crypto 账户的订阅服务。

items.title: Circle under fire after $285 million Drift hack over inaction to freeze stolen USDC
items.summary: Prominent blockchain sleuth ZachXBT alleged faster action by Circle could have limited crypto losses, but freezing asset without legal authorization carries legal risks.
items.title_zh: 由于不采取行动冻结被盗的 USDC，Circle 因 Drift 黑客攻击价值 2.85 亿美元而受到批评
items.summary_zh: 著名区块链侦探 ZachXBT 声称，Circle 更快的行动可能会限制加密货币损失，但未经法律授权冻结资产会带来法律风险。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin (BTC) trades flat while altcoins rise
items.summary: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) gained 5.8% and Avalanche (AVAX) climbed 3.6%.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：比特币 (BTC) 交易持平，而山寨币则上涨
items.summary_zh: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) 上涨 5.8%，Avalanche (AVAX) 上涨 3.6%。

items.title: HypurrFi investigates domain hijacking, warns users from interacting with lending protocol
items.summary: HypurrFi alerted users against interacting with its website and lending platform while it investigates a potential domain hijacking.
items.title_zh: HypurrFi 调查域名劫持，警告用户不要与借贷协议交互
items.summary_zh: HypurrFi 在调查潜在的域名劫持事件时提醒用户不要与其网站和借贷平台进行交互。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Siren (SIREN)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #184.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：海妖 (SIREN)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 184。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #45.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Pi Network (PI)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 45 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Monad (MON)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #128.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Monad (MON)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 128 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: edgeX (EDGE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #114.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：edgeX (EDGE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 114。

items.title: Trending Crypto: pippin (PIPPIN)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #556.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：pippin (PIPPIN)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名#556。

items.title: OpenAI acquires TBPN
items.summary: OpenAI acquires TBPN to accelerate global conversations around AI and support independent media, expanding dialogue with builders, businesses, and the broader tech community.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 TBPN
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 收购 TBPN 是为了加速围绕人工智能的全球对话并支持独立媒体，扩大与建筑商、企业和更广泛的技术社区的对话。

items.title: Gradient Labs gives every bank customer an AI account manager
items.summary: Gradient Labs uses GPT-4.1 and GPT-5.4 mini and nano to power AI agents that automate banking support workflows with low latency and high reliability.
items.title_zh: Gradient Labs 为每一位银行客户提供人工智能客户经理
items.summary_zh: Gradient Labs 使用 GPT-4.1 和 GPT-5.4 mini 和 nano 为 AI 代理提供支持，以低延迟和高可靠性自动化银行支持工作流程。

items.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
items.summary: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.
items.title_zh: 帮助开发者为青少年打造更安全的人工智能体验
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 使用 gpt-oss-safeguard 为开发人员发布基于提示的青少年安全策略，帮助缓解 AI 系统中特定年龄的风险。

items.title: Liberate your OpenClaw
items.title_zh: 解放你的 OpenClaw

items.title: Preview tool helps makers visualize 3D-printed objects
items.summary: By quickly generating aesthetically accurate previews of fabricated objects, the VisiPrint system could make prototyping faster and less wasteful.
items.title_zh: 预览工具可帮助创客可视化 3D 打印物体
items.summary_zh: 通过快速生成美观准确的预制件预览，VisiPrint 系统可以加快原型制作速度并减少浪费。

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.title: AI system learns to keep warehouse robot traffic running smoothly
items.summary: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get the right of way at every moment, avoiding congestion and increasing throughput.
items.title_zh: 人工智能系统学习保持仓库机器人交通平稳运行
items.summary_zh: 这种新方法可以随时决定哪些机器人应该获得通行权，从而避免拥堵并提高吞吐量。

items.title: Wristband enables wearers to control a robotic hand with their own movements
items.summary: By moving their hands and fingers, users can direct a robot to play piano or shoot a basketball, or they can manipulate objects in a virtual environment.
items.title_zh: 腕带使佩戴者能够通过自己的动作控制机械手
items.summary_zh: 通过移动他们的手和手指，用户可以指挥机器人弹钢琴或投篮球，或者他们可以操纵虚拟环境中的物体。

items.title: Recent Quant Links from Quantocracy as of 03/31/2026
items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Tuesday, 03/31/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Selling Volatility: The Most Seductive Backtest in Finance [Quantt] Here is a strategy with a thirty-year track record. Se
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日星期二 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！卖出波动性：金融领域最诱人的回测 [Quantt] 这是一个拥有三十年记录的策略。硒

items.title: Here's what 'cracking' bitcoin in 9 minutes by quantum computers actually means
items.summary: Google's quantum paper made headlines with that number. Here's what it means, what's actually at risk, and why 6.9 million bitcoin are more exposed than the rest.
items.title_zh: 这就是量子计算机在 9 分钟内“破解”比特币的实际含义
items.summary_zh: 谷歌的量子论文以这个数字成为头条新闻。这就是它的含义、实际面临的风险以及为什么 690 万比特币比其他比特币暴露得更多。

items.title: U.S. March jobs smash expectations, with 178,000 added
items.summary: Bitcoin continued to trade near the $67,000 level just following the strong report.
items.title_zh: 美国3月就业人数超预期，新增17.8万人
items.summary_zh: 在这份强劲的报告发布后，比特币继续在 67,000 美元附近交易。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation stakes another $93 million ether, reaching its 70,000 ETH target
items.summary: The foundation deposited the bulk of its planned staking commitment in a single session, completing a program announced in February to turn dormant treasury holdings into a yield-generating position.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会又投入 9300 万美元以太币，达到 70,000 ETH 目标
items.summary_zh: 该基金会在一次会议上存入了计划中的大部分质押承诺，完成了 2 月份宣布的一项计划，将休眠的国债持有量转变为产生收益的头寸。

items.title: Crypto consolidates as volatility cools and futures markets tilt bearish
items.summary: Bitcoin holds a tight range as altcoins rally on low liquidity, but derivatives data and options skew suggest traders are bracing for downside.
items.title_zh: 随着波动性降温和期货市场看跌，加密货币将盘整
items.summary_zh: 随着山寨币因低流动性而上涨，比特币保持窄幅波动，但衍生品数据和期权偏差表明交易者正在为下行做好准备。

items.title: Ethereum Foundation doubles staked ether, clearing two-thirds of 70,000 ETH target
items.summary: The foundation’s latest staking allocation mirrors its biggest-ever single-day move and is a major step-up from its initial February deployment.
items.title_zh: 以太坊基金会将质押以太币翻倍，完成 70,000 ETH 目标的三分之二
items.summary_zh: 该基金会最新的质押分配反映了其有史以来最大的单日变动，并且比最初的 2 月份部署有了重大进步。

items.title: How Securitize is working with NYSE to bring equities onchain
items.summary: Carlos Domingo explains how tokenized equities, regulatory clarity, and major partnerships like NYSE are pushing blockchain into mainstream finance.
items.title_zh: Securitize 如何与纽约证券交易所合作将股票引入链上
items.summary_zh: 卡洛斯·多明戈 (Carlos Domingo) 解释了代币化股票、监管透明度以及纽约证券交易所等主要合作伙伴如何将区块链推向主流金融。

items.title: Circle unveils plans for wrapped bitcoin token cirBTC
items.summary: Circle's bitcoin payments app Circle Pay was sunsetted in 2019 as the firm pivoted to focus solely on stablecoins.
items.title_zh: Circle 公布了打包比特币代币 cirBTC 的计划
items.summary_zh: Circle 的比特币支付应用程序 Circle Pay 于 2019 年被淘汰，因为该公司转向只专注于稳定币。

items.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.
items.title_zh: 深入了解我们的模型规格方法
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 的模型规范如何作为模型行为的公共框架，随着人工智能系统的进步，平衡安全性、用户自由和责任。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
items.summary: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 安全漏洞赏金计划简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出安全漏洞赏金计划，以识别人工智能滥用和安全风险，包括代理漏洞、提示注入和数据泄露。

items.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
items.summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 基金会的最新动态
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 基金会宣布计划投资至少 10 亿美元用于治疗疾病、经济机会、人工智能复原力和社区项目。

items.title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day
items.title_zh: 在一天之内构建特定领域的嵌入模型

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in March 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from March 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 3 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 3 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
items.summary: Veo 3.1 Lite is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最具成本效益的视频生成模型 Veo 3.1 Lite 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Veo 3.1 Lite 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.summary: Lyria 3 is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最新的音乐生成模型 Lyria 3 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Lyria 3 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.
items.title_zh: 评估自治系统的伦理
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员开发了一个测试框架，可以查明人工智能决策支持系统不公平对待人和社区的情况。

items.title: Huawei's cloud computing revenue dropped in 2025 as Chinese AI lagged U.S. rivals
items.summary: When including internal customers, the telecommunications giant said cloud computing revenue grew from a year ago.
items.title_zh: 中国AI落后美国竞争对手，华为2025年云计算收入下降
items.summary_zh: 当包括内部客户时，这家电信巨头表示云计算收入较一年前有所增长。

items.title: Rescue team in Iran face 'harrowing and dangerous' search for US crew member
items.summary: A former US marine tells the BBC the priority of any recovery team would be to look for signs of life.
items.title_zh: 伊朗救援队面临“痛苦且危险”的搜寻美国船员的任务
items.summary_zh: 一名前美国海军陆战队员告诉英国广播公司，任何救援小组的首要任务都是寻找生命迹象。

items.title: Burkina Faso must 'forget' about democracy, military leader says
items.summary: Capt Ibrahim Traoré, who seized power in 2023, says democratic rule would not work for his country.
items.title_zh: 军事领导人表示布基纳法索必须“忘记”民主
items.summary_zh: 2023 年掌权的易卜拉欣·特拉奥雷上尉表示，民主统治对他的国家不起作用。

items.title: French-owned ship passes through Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: It appears to be the first ship owned by a major European firm to go through the strait since the conflict began.
items.title_zh: 法国船通过霍尔木兹海峡
items.summary_zh: 这似乎是自冲突开始以来欧洲大公司拥有的第一艘穿过该海峡的船只。

items.title: Rapper Gucci Mane kidnapped and robbed by fellow artist, prosecutors say
items.summary: Officials say the hip-hop star was forced to sign papers releasing a rapper known as Pooh Shiesty from his record contract.
items.title_zh: 检察官称说唱歌手古奇·马内被同行艺术家绑架和抢劫
items.summary_zh: 官员们表示，这位嘻哈明星被迫签署文件，解除与说唱歌手 Pooh Shiesty 的唱片合同。

items.title: Trump seeks $1.5tn for defence alongside domestic spending cuts
items.summary: The US president's new budget would cut non-defence spending by 10%, partly by slashing domestic programmes.
items.title_zh: 特朗普在削减国内开支的同时寻求1.5万亿美元的国防开支
items.summary_zh: 美国总统的新预算将削减 10% 的非国防支出，部分原因是削减国内项目。

items.title: Cuba begins releasing more than 2,000 prisoners as US pressure mounts
items.summary: US President Trump has made clear his desire to change Cuba's leadership and has placed the country under an oil embargo.
items.title_zh: 随着美国压力的加大，古巴开始释放2000多名囚犯
items.summary_zh: 美国总统特朗普明确表示希望改变古巴领导层，并对古巴实施石油禁运。

items.title: US deports eight people 'of African origin' to Uganda
items.summary: The Uganda Law Society criticises the deportation, saying it was illegal and "dehumanising".
items.title_zh: 美国将八名“非洲裔”人驱逐到乌干达
items.summary_zh: 乌干达律师协会批评驱逐出境，称其非法且“非人化”。

items.title: Ex-US Army Pilot Recalls Battle for Survival When Shot Down in Iraq
items.summary: Ronald Young Jr. was in the Army when his Apache Longbow copter went down during the U.S. invasion of Iraq.
items.title_zh: 前美国陆军飞行员回忆在伊拉克被击落时的生存之战
items.summary_zh: 小罗纳德·杨 (Ronald Young Jr.) 正在陆军服役，他的阿帕奇长弓直升机在美国入侵伊拉克期间坠毁。

items.title: Could There Be a Popular Uprising in Cuba?
items.summary: There is no organized opposition on the island because many critics of the regime have fled. But anti-government protests have been growing.
items.title_zh: 古巴会发生民众起义吗？
items.summary_zh: 岛上没有有组织的反对派，因为许多对该政权的批评者已经逃离。但反政府抗议活动一直在增加。

items.title: In Syria, Kidnappings of Women and Girls Fuel a Minority Group’s Fears
items.summary: A Times investigation found that abductions of women and girls from Syria’s Alawite minority were more common, and more brutal, than the government has acknowledged.
items.title_zh: 在叙利亚，绑架妇女和女童事件加剧了少数群体的恐惧
items.summary_zh: 《纽约时报》的一项调查发现，绑架叙利亚阿拉维派妇女和女童的情况比政府承认的更为普遍、也更加残酷。

items.title: Rima Hassan Is Charged With Glorifying Terrorism Online in Social Media Post
items.summary: Rima Hassan, a member of the European Parliament, could face seven years in prison for the post, in which she quoted a perpetrator of a 1972 massacre in Israel.
items.title_zh: 里玛·哈桑被指控在社交媒体帖子中在线美化恐怖主义
items.summary_zh: 欧洲议会议员里玛·哈桑 (Rima Hassan) 可能因担任该职务而面临七年监禁，她在该职务中引用了 1972 年以色列大屠杀的肇事者的话。

items.title: Cosmopolitan Shanghai Is an Uneasy Fit in China’s Narrative of Western Sins
items.summary: Shanghai’s many layers of architecture, culture and politics have made it a difficult fit for the Communist Party’s preferred narrative of Chinese victimhood and Western sins.
items.title_zh: 国际化的上海与中国关于西方罪恶的叙述格格不入
items.summary_zh: 上海的建筑、文化和政治的多层性使其很难适应共产党所偏爱的中国受害者和西方罪恶的叙述。

items.title: Myanmar Junta Chief Ascends to President, Five Years After Coup
items.summary: U Min Aung Hlaing’s elevation to the civilian post is the conclusion of elections in the country, which were stage managed by the military.
items.title_zh: 政变五年后缅甸军政府首脑升任总统
items.summary_zh: 吴敏昂莱晋升为文职职位标志着该国选举的结束，这次选举是由军方管理的。

items.title: In a Muzzled Russia, He Still Speaks His Mind
items.summary: While hundreds of other journalists fled into exile after Moscow’s invasion of Ukraine in 2022, the Nobel Peace Prize laureate Dmitri A. Muratov stayed. But he did not stay quiet.
items.title_zh: 在被封口的俄罗斯，他仍然说出自己的想法
items.summary_zh: 2022 年莫斯科入侵乌克兰后，数百名记者逃亡，但诺贝尔和平奖获得者德米特里·A·穆拉托夫 (Dmitri A. Muratov) 留下来了。但他并没有保持沉默。

items.title: What next as XRP rises to $1.33 but fails to break out
items.summary: Price tracks broader crypto flows, with range-bound structure intact until $1.35 breaks.
items.title_zh: XRP 升至 1.33 美元但未能突破，接下来会发生什么
items.summary_zh: 价格追踪更广泛的加密货币流动，在跌破 1.35 美元之前，区间结构保持不变。

items.title: Crypto snoozes into Good Friday as oil and macro stir: Crypto Daybook Americas
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for April 3, 2026
items.title_zh: 随着石油和宏观经济的动荡，加密货币进入了耶稣受难日：美洲加密货币日记
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 4 月 3 日天气预报

items.title: Cosmos ecosystem’s Leap Wallet is shutting down
items.summary: After the collapse of Terra, Leap Wallet pivoted to provide support for the wider multi-chain Cosmos ecosystem.
items.title_zh: Cosmos 生态系统的 Leap 钱包即将关闭
items.summary_zh: Terra 崩溃后，Leap 钱包转向为更广泛的多链 Cosmos 生态系统提供支持。

items.title: JPMorgan says crypto flows drop to $11 billion in Q1, about one-third of first quarter last year
items.summary: Earlier this year, JPMorgan expected flows to rise further in 2026 after a record inflow of nearly $130 billion in 2025.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通称第一季度加密货币流量降至 110 亿美元，约为去年第一季度的三分之一
items.summary_zh: 今年早些时候，摩根大通预计继 2025 年创纪录的近 1,300 亿美元流入之后，2026 年资金流量将进一步增加。

items.title: Cambodia’s parliament passes law targeting online, crypto scam compounds
items.summary: The Law on Anti-Technology Fraud introduces five new offenses aimed at rooting out modern online scams and crimes.
items.title_zh: 柬埔寨议会通过针对在线加密货币诈骗化合物的法律
items.summary_zh: 《反技术欺诈法》引入了五项新罪行，旨在根除现代网络诈骗和犯罪。

items.title: Blockchain sleuth ZachXBT accuses Circle of slow USDC freezes across more than $420 million in ‘illicit funds’
items.summary: ZachXBT cites over a dozen cases involving over $420 million, the most recent being the Drift Protocol exploit worth more than $280 million.
items.title_zh: 区块链侦探 ZachXBT 指责 Circle 缓慢冻结 USDC 超过 4.2 亿美元的“非法资金”
items.summary_zh: ZachXBT 列举了十多个案例，涉及金额超过 4.2 亿美元，最近的一个是价值超过 2.8 亿美元的 Drift Protocol 漏洞。

items.title: Bittensor breakout fuels AI token rally as distributed training gains credibility
items.summary: The price of TAO nearly doubled in March, as the market is catching up to a realization of what the Bittensor network can do.
items.title_zh: 随着分布式训练获得可信度，Bittensor 的突破推动了 AI 代币的上涨
items.summary_zh: 随着市场逐渐认识到 Bittensor 网络的功能，TAO 的价格在 3 月份几乎翻了一番。

items.title: Codex now offers more flexible pricing for teams
items.summary: Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, providing teams a more flexible option to start and scale adoption.
items.title_zh: Codex 现在为团队提供更灵活的定价
items.summary_zh: Codex 现在包括 ChatGPT 商业版和企业版的即用即付定价，为团队提供更灵活的选择来启动和扩展采用。

items.title: Accelerating the next phase of AI
items.summary: OpenAI raises $122 billion in new funding to expand frontier AI globally, invest in next-generation compute, and meet growing demand for ChatGPT, Codex, and enterprise AI.
items.title_zh: 加速人工智能的下一阶段
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 筹集了 1220 亿美元的新资金，用于在全球范围内扩展前沿人工智能，投资下一代计算，并满足对 ChatGPT、Codex 和企业人工智能不断增长的需求。

items.title: Helping disaster response teams turn AI into action across Asia
items.summary: AI for Disaster Response in Asia: OpenAI Workshop with Gates Foundation
items.title_zh: 帮助救灾团队将人工智能转化为亚洲各地的行动
items.summary_zh: 亚洲救灾人工智能：与盖茨基金会合作的 OpenAI 研讨会

items.title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
items.summary: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.
items.title_zh: STADLER 重塑一家拥有 230 年历史的公司的知识工作
items.summary_zh: 了解 STADLER 如何使用 ChatGPT 来转变知识工作，从而节省 650 名员工的时间并提高工作效率。

items.title: Welcome Gemma 4: Frontier multimodal intelligence on device
items.title_zh: 欢迎 Gemma 4：设备上的前沿多模式智能

items.title: Holo3: Breaking the Computer Use Frontier
items.title_zh: Holo3：打破计算机使用前沿

items.title: Falcon Perception
items.title_zh: 猎鹰感知

items.title: Granite 4.0 3B Vision: Compact Multimodal Intelligence for Enterprise Documents
items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 3B Vision：企业文档的紧凑型多模式智能

items.title: TRL v1.0: Post-Training Library Built to Move with the Field
items.title_zh: TRL v1.0：专为随场移动而构建的训练后库

items.title: A New Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents (EVA)
items.title_zh: 评估语音代理 (EVA) 的新框架

items.title: State of Open Source on Hugging Face: Spring 2026
items.title_zh: 拥抱开源的现状：2026 年春季

items.title: Holotron-12B - High Throughput Computer Use Agent
items.title_zh: Holotron-12B - 高吞吐量计算机使用代理

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.title_zh: 观看 James Manyika 与 LL COOL J 谈论人工智能和创造力。
items.summary_zh: 在我们的技术与社会对话系列的最新一集中，LL COOL J 与 James Manyika 进行了访谈。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
items.summary: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.title_zh: 将您的耳机变成 iOS 上的实时个人翻译器。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS！我们正在将 iOS 和 Android 用户的功能扩展到更多国家/地区……

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live：让音频AI更加自然可靠
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Search Live is expanding globally
items.summary: We’re expanding Search Live globally, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
items.title_zh: Search Live 正在全球扩张
items.summary_zh: 我们正在全球范围内将 Search Live 扩展到支持 AI 模式的所有语言和地点。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。

items.title: Seeing sounds
items.summary: Mariano Salcedo ’25, a master’s student in the new Music Technology and Computation Graduate Program, is designing an AI to visualize and express music and other sounds.
items.title_zh: 看到声音
items.summary_zh: Mariano Salcedo ' 25 是新音乐技术和计算研究生项目的硕士生，正在设计一种人工智能来可视化和表达音乐和其他声音。

items.title: How to create “humble” AI
items.summary: An MIT-led team is designing artificial intelligence systems for medical diagnosis that are more collaborative and forthcoming about uncertainty.
items.title_zh: 如何创造“谦逊”的人工智能
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院领导的团队正在设计用于医疗诊断的人工智能系统，该系统对于不确定性更具协作性和主动性。
